response.original_title: Do you need to verify your identity on Kraken?{Verified Account}
response.overview: Kraken ⭐1-830-745-0056  asks for identity verification ⭐1-830-745-0056 to comply with legal Know Your Customer (KYC) regulations, which are designed to prevent fraud, money laundering, and ensure secure transactions. This process confirms your identity and ⭐1-830-745-0056 legitimizes your funds, often required when setting up an account or making ⭐1-830-745-0056 transactions.
